'''âb-t-r-p''' ('''kabatrepoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:wend|wend]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-t-r-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wend|wend]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âb-t-r-p
|-
! Lemma
| kabatrepoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thibatrepoko|thibatrepoko]] || [[word:jibatrepoko|jibatrepoko]] || [[word:shibatrepoko|shibatrepoko]] || [[word:kibatrepoko|kibatrepoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthubatrepoko|thuthubatrepoko]] || [[word:jujubatrepoko|jujubatrepoko]] || [[word:shushubatrepoko|shushubatrepoko]] || [[word:kukubatrepoko|kukubatrepoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thobatrepoko|thobatrepoko]] || [[word:jobatrepoko|jobatrepoko]] || [[word:shobatrepoko|shobatrepoko]] || [[word:kobatrepoko|kobatrepoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŚbatrepoko|thĂŚbatrepoko]] || [[word:jĂŚbatrepoko|jĂŚbatrepoko]] || [[word:shĂŚbatrepoko|shĂŚbatrepoko]] || [[word:kĂŚbatrepoko|kĂŚbatrepoko]]

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thabatrepoko|thabatrepoko]] || [[word:jabatrepoko|jabatrepoko]] || [[word:shabatrepoko|shabatrepoko]] || [[word:kabatrepoko|kabatrepoko]]
|}

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
